indicators.name: large windows with patterned glass
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, which can be disruptive to sleep.

indicators.name: high ceilings with decorative moldings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings and decorative moldings suggest a formal setting, which may not be conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: staircase with metal railings
indicators.rationale: The staircase with metal railings suggests movement and activity, which can disturb sleep.

indicators.name: furniture arrangement with sofas and chairs
indicators.rationale: Furniture arrangement with sofas and chairs suggests a social or leisure area, not conducive to sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for primary sleep. The large windows, high ceilings, staircase, and furniture arrangement all suggest a formal, active environment that is not conducive to sleep. The score is 3 out of 7 because there are no strong positive indicators present.
